title: Crusty Cobblemonsters 2.0
description: Welcome Cobblemasters! CC2 introduces to you the Cobblemon you love, and those you hate, alongside QOL mods and others!
body:
HELLO COBBLEMASTERS!

Introducing the star of the show, the Cobblemon mod, filled with the Cobblemonsters you love, and even some you hate.
Look forward to the new version of my modpack with up-to-date mods that you'll find hard to put down.

Explore the ends of your Nature's Spirit world with the help of Waystones and Compasses.
Conquer Dungeons and Taverns, decorate with Furniture, farm with Delight, and be the very best.
The world is your Cloyster!



STARS OF THE SHOW?

Your favorite, Cobblemon, duh!
Explore a world of Nature's Spirit!
Build and decorate!
Show off with not only your Cobblemon, but with stylish hats and trinkets!
Dungeons and Taverns, along with Towns and Towers, there's so much to explore!
Enjoy your QOL mods like Appleskin, Gravestones, Cosmetic Armor, and more!
